message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first ApprovalStore.issue_for_plan in plan CLI (tick 275)

Migrates 2 ambient `ApprovalStore::issue_for_plan` call sites in
`frankenterm/main.rs` to the cx-first sibling `issue_for_plan_with_cx`:

- L26822 `ft plan execute` dispatch (when the plan requires approval):
  `store.issue_for_plan_with_cx(&plan_approval_cx, &input, &plan_hash,
  plan_version, Some(summary.clone()))` — issues a scoped approval
  token bound to the plan's hash + version.
- L27068 `ft plan prepare` dispatch (when prepared plan requires
  approval pre-commit): same migration with
  `&plan_prepare_cx` + `Some(name.clone())` summary.

Both sites resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`.
The `_with_cx` variant threads cx through the internal
`insert_approval_token_with_cx` + audit write so a cx-cancel during
plan approval issuance cleanly aborts the token insert instead of
leaving a half-inserted row.

Combined with tick 274's `consume_with_context_with_cx` +
`issue_with_cx` migrations in `apply_approval_gate`, the entire
ApprovalStore surface for production CLI is now cx-first. The sole
remaining ambient `issue` site (L49861) is in test-mod.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 89 (187-275).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 152 sites (150 before + 2).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
